backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all core types (User, Layanan, TaskRecord, Delegation, etc.) and state maps for the Asistenku platform, with role-based access control via mixins and full CRUD logic for users, tasks, delegations, top-ups, and financial profiles.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that re-declares all backend types and defines a `run` function to transform old actor state; currently a passthrough that returns the old state unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the application was restored to Version 58 by reverting all Version 59 changes across a specific set of frontend files.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of every component, page, hook, and utility.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Asistenku React SPA, mounting the app at `#root` and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that configures TanStack Router with a public layout (Home, TentangPartner, InternalPortal, PartnerPortal, ClientRegister) and an app layout (dashboard routes for client, partner, admin, asistenmu, finance, and internal).
frontend/src/components/Closing.tsx: Simple centered closing section displaying a single motivational tagline about good work starting with the right support.
frontend/src/components/ConversionStatem: Teal-background section emphasizing the one-unit-equals-one-completed-job service model with no hidden fees.
frontend/src/components/DelegationForm.t: Form component for assigning a task to a partner, featuring partner search with live results, deadline picker, and fields for effective hours and units used, submitted via the `useCreateDelegation` mutation.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with the Asistenku logo, copyright year, and navigation links to WhatsApp concierge, internal login, and partner portal.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky top navigation header with desktop and mobile (hamburger) menus, linking to the home page, services section (smooth scroll), partner info page, and client registration.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Landing page hero section with a headline, description, and two CTA buttons (scroll to services and WhatsApp chat), alongside a hero image.
frontend/src/components/HowWeSupport.tsx: Displays a four-step process section explaining how Asistenku works, from consultation to task completion, in a responsive grid layout.
frontend/src/components/JoinTeam.tsx: A call-to-action section inviting users to become an Asistenku partner, with a button navigating to the partner info page.
frontend/src/components/layout/Dashboard: Layout wrapper for dashboard pages that renders a custom header slot, a centered main content area, and a standard footer.
frontend/src/components/ServiceCards.tsx: Renders a grid of service cards using an accordion UI for four service types (Tanya Jawab, Asisten Harian, Riset & Analisis, Konten Kreatif), each with pricing and a WhatsApp CTA.
frontend/src/components/TaskCard.tsx: Displays a single task card with status badge, service type, deadline, partner info, Google Drive link, and an optional 'Tandai Selesai' button for tasks in review status.
frontend/src/components/TimelyDelivery.t: A simple informational section highlighting Asistenku's parallel task processing model and active deadline monitoring for on-time delivery.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for all backend interactions including admin bootstrap, user management (register client/partner), task operations, and layanan queries using the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, CSS custom properties for light/dark theming using OKLCH colors, and utility classes for brand-specific teal and navy colors.
frontend/src/layouts/AppLayout.tsx: Minimal authenticated app layout that renders a full-height flex container with a main content area and a TanStack Router Outlet.
frontend/src/layouts/PublicLayout.tsx: Public-facing layout that wraps pages with a shared Header and Footer alongside a TanStack Router Outlet for page content.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ClientRegister.tsx: Client registration page that guides users through Internet Identity login and then collects name, email, and WhatsApp to register as a client via the useRegisterClient mutation.
frontend/src/pages/dashboard/AdminUser.t: Admin User dashboard page that displays user statistics by role (clients, partners, asistenmu, staff) and a filterable list of all registered users.
frontend/src/pages/dashboard/Asistenmu.t: Asistenmu dashboard page that displays tasks grouped by status (open, in-progress, review, done) and supports opening a delegation dialog for assigning tasks to partners.
frontend/src/pages/dashboard/finance.tsx: Finance dashboard page with collapsible sections for managing layanan (services), creating new layanan, topping up units, and viewing top-up history using paginated queries and form inputs.
frontend/src/pages/dashboard/internal.ts: Internal dashboard page for admin/internal users, providing user management (list, register) with role selection, and composing sub-dashboards for admin, finance, and asistenmu roles.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardClient.tsx: Client dashboard page displaying the client's layanan and tasks with collapsible sections, a task creation form, and the ability to mark tasks as complete.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPartner.tsx: Partner dashboard page showing assigned tasks grouped by status, with the ability to request a review on in-progress tasks and view internal Google Drive links.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Public home page that composes multiple marketing section components (Hero, HowWeSupport, ServiceCards, etc.) into a single landing page.
frontend/src/pages/InternalPortal.tsx: Internal staff portal page that handles Internet Identity login/logout, principal lookup, staff registration, and admin claim functionality with navigation to the internal dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PartnerPortal.tsx: Partner portal page that handles Internet Identity authentication, role checking, and new partner registration with a multi-step flow (auth → register → success).
frontend/src/pages/TentangPartner.tsx: Static informational page describing the Asistenku partner program, including benefits, how to join, and the payment system.
frontend/src/utils/smoothScroll.ts: Exports a single utility function that smoothly scrolls the page to a DOM element by its ID.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH-based design tokens, custom colors (teal, navy, sidebar, chart), border radius, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking schema version, existing features, and configuration for a task to revert the application to Version 58.
